extract: Latias (Japanese: ラティアス Latias) is a dual-type Dragon/Psychic Legendary Pokémon introduced in Generation III. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Latias can Mega Evolve into Mega Latias using the Latiasite. Mega Latias was introduced with Pokémon X and Y, and later made its official debut in Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire. It is a member of the eon duo along with Latios.
